TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Eritrea hya' ga cyux maki' tay 15 00 N, 39 00 E na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 117,600 sq km (maki' tay 101ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 101,000 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 16,600 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 5,869,869. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 75.10%, lhlahuy hya' ga 15.10%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 9.80%. zyuwaw na sraral 歷史 zik nqu Ziray kinlhangan Kokka nqu Eritrea ga sazing qu qinsugan naha, gmluw squ rhyal na bslilung (cingay qu squli 穆斯林 nyux maki sqani) m'bung nqu Kokka 鄂圖曼帝 na rhyal 埃及, qalang cyux kya ska wagiq na rhzyal balay hga kinbalay nqu 衣索比亞 gwagiq na ki'an ssquliq, maki squ 1890 kawas kwara ka rhyal naha ga nyux qolan na 義大利, nanu siglgiy mlahang nqu 義大利 ru rhyal naha lga klhangan nqu 義大利 la, babaw nqu minsazing pintriqan naha sa cinbwanan lga maki qu sinwalan sinqunan na Kokka ga, msqun ki 衣索比亞 ps'rux squ sinqunan 衣索比亞和厄利垂亞. maki squ 1962 kawas 衣索比亞 qani ga nyux nya psqunun, ru maki squ Kokka naha qani ga te mopuw payat qu rhyal naha 省. taqu ginbahan nqu 厄利垂亞 pinsrxan squ 1960 kawas, skahul naha squ bningan naha qeqaya musa mqhzyuwaw magan squ 厄利垂亞 mshriq sa 衣索比亞. squliq nqu 厄利垂亞 ginbahan maki sa linhuyan 1970 kawas sa ginlengan na 伊薩亞斯·阿費沃爾基 kahun squ 厄利垂亞 snka hintgan na ginbahan maki squ pintriqan, n_giyut yugun kahul squ suruw mwaha m'zik na rhyal nqu spyang smyuk na linhuyan hitay 厄利垂亞. kinlhangan na 衣索比亞門格斯圖 maki squ 1991 kawas babaw nqu wayan nah pkuxun, maki squ 梅萊斯·澤納維 giqas na sinnwalan Sexu maki sa 厄利垂亞 ptuqiq squ mspkwara mu snpung biru, mosa skahun sinwalan mwaha mshriq rhyal nqu 衣索比亞. maki squ 1993 kawas4 byacing wayal balay kahun squ mmrhuw na linhuyan sinqunan Kokka ki zik na kinlhang mita mtzywaw squ mspkwara mu snpung biru, sunqani mita skahun squ 99.8% ga wayal smwan maha pshriq sami squ 衣索比亞 la, nanu yasa qu mtnaq sa kawas 5 byacing 24 ryax lga kmayal maha pbucisami nanak la. 1994 kawas, squliq 厄利垂亞 ka ginubah maki squ linhuyan wayal yugun linhuyan maha squliq minruk ki mshyu nqu linhuyan . 2018 kawas 7 byacing, tmasuq qu zyuwaw pintriqan na 衣索比亞 ki 厄利垂亞, mrhuw nqu 衣索比亞 阿比·艾哈邁德·阿里sigluw maqut 厄利垂亞 squ pinswalan pinsqunan naha inlungan miru squ binkgan. sazing qu mrhuw na Kokka,spyang mrhuw qu nyux kmayal maha tringaw ta lozi qu smsun zyuwaw gwahan tbziran,smsun ppila,gwahan glgan ki zyuwaw na pinsrngyan, tehok squ 2021 kawas 7 byacing linhuyan nqu hitay na 厄利垂亞 ga ini shriq squ 衣索比亞 min htgan zyuwaw na pintriqan maki te mkura tltu 泰格瑞省. rrhyal 地理 maki squ ht'gan wagi na 非 ki te mkura tltu nqu hkuwi非洲, mkura kilux te bsilung na 扼紅. bih nqu mkura kilux 衣索比亞, mksobih tekyopan wagi na 蘇丹, ht'gan wagi mkura kilux ki 'mubuy squ rhyal na 吉布, ht'gan wagi mkura tltu qwayan bsilung na 紅海ki葉門 ru mkkita squ kintan bsilung na 沙烏地阿拉伯. (kinkwara nqu cyux kki'an 達赫拉克 ru 355 nqu qalang rhyal) kinqruyaux nya ga wayal sa 1350 kung ri. spyang wagiq maki te k'ska rhyal nqu Kokka naha ga wayal squ 三分之一, kinwagiq nya ga 1800 tehuk squ 3000 mi; kilrruq nqu rhyal mkura tltu, rhyal ka ht'gan wagi sigluw squ be'nux na rhyal. maki squ zik na rhyal qani ga spyang kinwagiq rgyax ga maki te tska wagiq ryax na 安姆巴-索依拉峰 (Amba Soira), kinwagiq nya ga 3013 mi, kinrroq nya ga maki squ rhyal te ht'gan wagi na 科巴爾 (Kobar), hminas squ kinrroq na bslung te 75 mi, 塞迪特河 (Setit) sikaki squ zik na rhyal qani qutux blnbabay na llyung, kinqruyux nya ga 180 kung ri, spyang krahu nqu qinsugan ryax llyung na 河馬雷布kinqruyux sunan ryax nqu qsya ga tehuk squ 440 kung ri. kayal na maki sa wagiq rgyax ga blaq balayqsliq, kinhlhun nqu qutux qutux kawas ga tntnaq squ 17°C, qlwaxan na qsyahya ga 525 hawmi. 12 byacing tehuk squ 2 byacing tntnaq na spyang rroq kinhyaqan ga maki sa, 15°C, 5 byacing tehuk squ 6 byacing kinwagiq nqu kayan ga, maki squ 25°C; 4 byacing tehuk 5 byacing ga cikuy qu qwalax nya, 6byacing tehuk squ 8 byacing ga krahu qu qwalax nya, taqu msyaw nqu byacing hya lga mtkyay sala. rhyal nqu ht'gan wagi ki rhyal na tekyopan wagi ka rroq na rhyal hya ga mkilux ru mtkyay qu kayal nya, qutux qutux kawas ka tntnaq na pinbcywan kayal ga 30°C ki 28°C, qutux qutux kawas ka tntnaq byaqan qwalax ga ini tehuk sa 400 hawmi. taqu bsilung na 紅 sigluw squ kintan ga cingay qu bnaqiy nya, zyuwaw nqu 3 byacing tehuk sa 10 byacing kayal nqu qlyan ga tehuk squ babaw 40°C. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Asmara. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 24 na tay ymagal byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Isaias Afwerki, aring ryax 24 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 1993 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部
S.PHON: eritrea ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ taj ** ** n, ** ** e na xweʦ~ʨo s~ɕjuw. kwaraʔ kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nijaʔ ***,*** s~ɕq km (makiʔ taj ***ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨiʔ) (kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ nijaʔ ɣa ***,*** s~ɕq km, kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa **,*** s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa *,***,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħaʔ s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ rħzjal ħjaʔ ij pqmaħun ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%, lħlaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%, s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħjaʔ ɣa *.**%. zjuwaw na s~ɕraral ** zik nqu ziraj kinlħaŋan kokka nqu eritrea ɣa s~ɕaziŋ qu qins~ɕuɣan naħa, ɣmluw s~ɕqu rħjal na βs~ɕliluŋ (ʦ~ʨiŋaj qu s~ɕquli *** njux maki s~ɕqani) mʔβuŋ nqu kokka **** na rħjal **, qalaŋ ʦ~ʨjux kja s~ɕka waɣiq na rħzjal βalaj ħɣa kinβalaj nqu **** ɣwaɣiq na kiʔan s~ɕs~ɕquliq, maki s~ɕqu **** kawas~ɕ kwara ka rħjal naħa ɣa njux qolan na ***, nanu s~ɕiɣlɣij mlaħaŋ nqu *** ru rħjal naħa lɣa klħaŋan nqu *** la, βaβaw nqu mins~ɕaziŋ pintriqan naħa s~ɕa ʦ~ʨinβwanan lɣa maki qu s~ɕinwalan s~ɕinqunan na kokka ɣa, ms~ɕqun ki **** ps~ɕʔrux s~ɕqu s~ɕinqunan *********. maki s~ɕqu **** kawas~ɕ **** qani ɣa njux nja ps~ɕqunun, ru maki s~ɕqu kokka naħa qani ɣa te mopuw pajat qu rħjal naħa *. taqu ɣinβaħan nqu **** pins~ɕrxan s~ɕqu **** kawas~ɕ, s~ɕkaħul naħa s~ɕqu βniŋan naħa qeqaja mus~ɕa mqħzjuwaw maɣan s~ɕqu **** ms~ɕħriq s~ɕa ****. s~ɕquliq nqu **** ɣinβaħan maki s~ɕa linħujan **** kawas~ɕ s~ɕa ɣinleŋan na ********** kaħun s~ɕqu **** s~ɕnka ħintɣan na ɣinβaħan maki s~ɕqu pintriqan, nɣijut juɣun kaħul s~ɕqu s~ɕuruw mwaħa mʔzik na rħjal nqu s~ɕpjaŋ s~ɕmjuk na linħujan ħitaj ****. kinlħaŋan na ******** maki s~ɕqu **** kawas~ɕ βaβaw nqu wajan naħ pkuxun, maki s~ɕqu ******* ɣiqas~ɕ na s~ɕinnwalan s~ɕexu maki s~ɕa **** ptuqiq s~ɕqu ms~ɕpkwara mu s~ɕnpuŋ βiru, mos~ɕa s~ɕkaħun s~ɕinwalan mwaħa ms~ɕħriq rħjal nqu ****. maki s~ɕqu **** kawas~ɕ* βjaʦ~ʨiŋ wajal βalaj kaħun s~ɕqu mmrħuw na linħujan s~ɕinqunan kokka ki zik na kinlħaŋ mita mtzjwaw s~ɕqu ms~ɕpkwara mu s~ɕnpuŋ βiru, s~ɕunqani mita s~ɕkaħun s~ɕqu **.*% ɣa wajal s~ɕmwan maħa ps~ɕħriq s~ɕami s~ɕqu **** la, nanu jas~ɕa qu mtnaq s~ɕa kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax lɣa kmajal maħa pβuʦ~ʨis~ɕami nanak la. **** kawas~ɕ, s~ɕquliq **** ka ɣinuβaħ maki s~ɕqu linħujan wajal juɣun linħujan maħa s~ɕquliq minruk ki ms~ɕħju nqu linħujan . **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ, tmas~ɕuq qu zjuwaw pintriqan na **** ki ****, mrħuw nqu **** **********s~ɕiɣluw maqut **** s~ɕqu pins~ɕwalan pins~ɕqunan naħa inluŋan miru s~ɕqu βinkɣan. s~ɕaziŋ qu mrħuw na kokka,s~ɕpjaŋ mrħuw qu njux kmajal maħa triŋaw ta lozi qu s~ɕms~ɕun zjuwaw ɣwaħan tβziran,s~ɕms~ɕun ppila,ɣwaħan ɣlɣan ki zjuwaw na pins~ɕrŋjan, teħok s~ɕqu **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ linħujan nqu ħitaj na **** ɣa ini s~ɕħriq s~ɕqu **** min ħtɣan zjuwaw na pintriqan maki te mkura tltu ****. rrħjal ** maki s~ɕqu ħtʔɣan waɣi na * ki te mkura tltu nqu ħkuwi**, mkura kilux te βs~ɕiluŋ na **. βiħ nqu mkura kilux ****, mks~ɕoβiħ tekjopan waɣi na **, ħtʔɣan waɣi mkura kilux ki ʔmuβuj s~ɕqu rħjal na **, ħtʔɣan waɣi mkura tltu qwajan βs~ɕiluŋ na **ki** ru mkkita s~ɕqu kintan βs~ɕiluŋ na ******. (kinkwara nqu ʦ~ʨjux kkiʔan **** ru *** nqu qalaŋ rħjal) kinqrujaux nja ɣa wajal s~ɕa **** kuŋ ri. s~ɕpjaŋ waɣiq maki te kʔs~ɕka rħjal nqu kokka naħa ɣa wajal s~ɕqu ****, kinwaɣiq nja ɣa **** teħuk s~ɕqu **** mi; kilrruq nqu rħjal mkura tltu, rħjal ka ħtʔɣan waɣi s~ɕiɣluw s~ɕqu βeʔnux na rħjal. maki s~ɕqu zik na rħjal qani ɣa s~ɕpjaŋ kinwaɣiq rɣjax ɣa maki te ts~ɕka waɣiq rjax na ***-**** (amβa s~ɕoira), kinwaɣiq nja ɣa **** mi, kinrroq nja ɣa maki s~ɕqu rħjal te ħtʔɣan waɣi na *** (koβar), ħminas~ɕ s~ɕqu kinrroq na βs~ɕluŋ te ** mi, **** (s~ɕetit) s~ɕikaki s~ɕqu zik na rħjal qani qutux βlnβaβaj na lljuŋ, kinqrujux nja ɣa *** kuŋ ri, s~ɕpjaŋ kraħu nqu qins~ɕuɣan rjax lljuŋ na ****kinqrujux s~ɕunan rjax nqu qs~ɕja ɣa teħuk s~ɕqu *** kuŋ ri. kajal na maki s~ɕa waɣiq rɣjax ɣa βlaq βalajqs~ɕliq, kinħlħun nqu qutux qutux kawas~ɕ ɣa tntnaq s~ɕqu ***ʦ~ʨ, qlwaxan na qs~ɕjaħja ɣa *** ħawmi. ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ teħuk s~ɕqu * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ tntnaq na s~ɕpjaŋ rroq kinħjaqan ɣa maki s~ɕa, ***ʦ~ʨ, * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ teħuk s~ɕqu * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ kinwaɣiq nqu kajan ɣa, maki s~ɕqu ***ʦ~ʨ; * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ teħuk * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ɣa ʦ~ʨikuj qu qwalax nja, *βjaʦ~ʨiŋ teħuk s~ɕqu * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ɣa kraħu qu qwalax nja, taqu ms~ɕjaw nqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ħja lɣa mtkjaj s~ɕala. rħjal nqu ħtʔɣan waɣi ki rħjal na tekjopan waɣi ka rroq na rħjal ħja ɣa mkilux ru mtkjaj qu kajal nja, qutux qutux kawas~ɕ ka tntnaq na pinβʦ~ʨjwan kajal ɣa ***ʦ~ʨ ki ***ʦ~ʨ, qutux qutux kawas~ɕ ka tntnaq βjaqan qwalax ɣa ini teħuk s~ɕa *** ħawmi. taqu βs~ɕiluŋ na * s~ɕiɣluw s~ɕqu kintan ɣa ʦ~ʨiŋaj qu βnaqij nja, zjuwaw nqu * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ teħuk s~ɕa ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ kajal nqu qljan ɣa teħuk s~ɕqu βaβaw ***ʦ~ʨ. s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ s~ɕpzjaŋ naħaʔ kraħuʔ qalaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa as~ɕmara. s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa ** na taj jmaɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na qutux kawas~ɕ. mrħuw kokkaʔ mrħuw kokkaʔ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa is~ɕaias~ɕ a*werki, ariŋ rjax ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨia ***
S.FORM: Eritrea hya' ga cyux maki' tay 15 00 N, 39 00 E na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 117,600 sq km (maki' tay 101ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 101,000 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 16,600 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 5,869,869. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 75.10%, lhlahuy hya' ga 15.10%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 9.80%. zyuwaw na sraral 歷史 zik nqu Ziray kinlhangan Kokka nqu Eritrea ga sazing qu qinsugan naha, gmluw squ rhyal na bslilung (cingay qu squli 穆斯林 nyux maki sqani) m'bung nqu Kokka 鄂圖曼帝 na rhyal 埃及, qalang cyux kya ska wagiq na rhzyal balay hga kinbalay nqu 衣索比亞 gwagiq na ki'an ssquliq, maki squ 1890 kawas kwara ka rhyal naha ga nyux qolan na 義大利, nanu siglgiy mlahang nqu 義大利 ru rhyal naha lga klhangan nqu 義大利 la, babaw nqu minsazing pintriqan naha sa cinbwanan lga maki qu sinwalan sinqunan na Kokka ga, msqun ki 衣索比亞 ps'rux squ sinqunan 衣索比亞和厄利垂亞. maki squ 1962 kawas 衣索比亞 qani ga nyux nya psqunun, ru maki squ Kokka naha qani ga te mopuw payat qu rhyal naha 省. taqu ginbahan nqu 厄利垂亞 pinsrxan squ 1960 kawas, skahul naha squ bningan naha qeqaya musa mqhzyuwaw magan squ 厄利垂亞 mshriq sa 衣索比亞. squliq nqu 厄利垂亞 ginbahan maki sa linhuyan 1970 kawas sa ginlengan na 伊薩亞斯·阿費沃爾基 kahun squ 厄利垂亞 snka hintgan na ginbahan maki squ pintriqan, n_giyut yugun kahul squ suruw mwaha m'zik na rhyal nqu spyang smyuk na linhuyan hitay 厄利垂亞. kinlhangan na 衣索比亞門格斯圖 maki squ 1991 kawas babaw nqu wayan nah pkuxun, maki squ 梅萊斯·澤納維 giqas na sinnwalan Sexu maki sa 厄利垂亞 ptuqiq squ mspkwara mu snpung biru, mosa skahun sinwalan mwaha mshriq rhyal nqu 衣索比亞. maki squ 1993 kawas4 byacing wayal balay kahun squ mmrhuw na linhuyan sinqunan Kokka ki zik na kinlhang mita mtzywaw squ mspkwara mu snpung biru, sunqani mita skahun squ 99.8% ga wayal smwan maha pshriq sami squ 衣索比亞 la, nanu yasa qu mtnaq sa kawas 5 byacing 24 ryax lga kmayal maha pbucisami nanak la. 1994 kawas, squliq 厄利垂亞 ka ginubah maki squ linhuyan wayal yugun linhuyan maha squliq minruk ki mshyu nqu linhuyan . 2018 kawas 7 byacing, tmasuq qu zyuwaw pintriqan na 衣索比亞 ki 厄利垂亞, mrhuw nqu 衣索比亞 阿比·艾哈邁德·阿里sigluw maqut 厄利垂亞 squ pinswalan pinsqunan naha inlungan miru squ binkgan. sazing qu mrhuw na Kokka,spyang mrhuw qu nyux kmayal maha tringaw ta lozi qu smsun zyuwaw gwahan tbziran,smsun ppila,gwahan glgan ki zyuwaw na pinsrngyan, tehok squ 2021 kawas 7 byacing linhuyan nqu hitay na 厄利垂亞 ga ini shriq squ 衣索比亞 min htgan zyuwaw na pintriqan maki te mkura tltu 泰格瑞省. rrhyal 地理 maki squ ht'gan wagi na 非 ki te mkura tltu nqu hkuwi非洲, mkura kilux te bsilung na 扼紅. bih nqu mkura kilux 衣索比亞, mksobih tekyopan wagi na 蘇丹, ht'gan wagi mkura kilux ki 'mubuy squ rhyal na 吉布, ht'gan wagi mkura tltu qwayan bsilung na 紅海ki葉門 ru mkkita squ kintan bsilung na 沙烏地阿拉伯. (kinkwara nqu cyux kki'an 達赫拉克 ru 355 nqu qalang rhyal) kinqruyaux nya ga wayal sa 1350 kung ri. spyang wagiq maki te k'ska rhyal nqu Kokka naha ga wayal squ 三分之一, kinwagiq nya ga 1800 tehuk squ 3000 mi; kilrruq nqu rhyal mkura tltu, rhyal ka ht'gan wagi sigluw squ be'nux na rhyal. maki squ zik na rhyal qani ga spyang kinwagiq rgyax ga maki te tska wagiq ryax na 安姆巴-索依拉峰 (Amba Soira), kinwagiq nya ga 3013 mi, kinrroq nya ga maki squ rhyal te ht'gan wagi na 科巴爾 (Kobar), hminas squ kinrroq na bslung te 75 mi, 塞迪特河 (Setit) sikaki squ zik na rhyal qani qutux blnbabay na llyung, kinqruyux nya ga 180 kung ri, spyang krahu nqu qinsugan ryax llyung na 河馬雷布kinqruyux sunan ryax nqu qsya ga tehuk squ 440 kung ri. kayal na maki sa wagiq rgyax ga blaq balayqsliq, kinhlhun nqu qutux qutux kawas ga tntnaq squ 17°C, qlwaxan na qsyahya ga 525 hawmi. 12 byacing tehuk squ 2 byacing tntnaq na spyang rroq kinhyaqan ga maki sa, 15°C, 5 byacing tehuk squ 6 byacing kinwagiq nqu kayan ga, maki squ 25°C; 4 byacing tehuk 5 byacing ga cikuy qu qwalax nya, 6byacing tehuk squ 8 byacing ga krahu qu qwalax nya, taqu msyaw nqu byacing hya lga mtkyay sala. rhyal nqu ht'gan wagi ki rhyal na tekyopan wagi ka rroq na rhyal hya ga mkilux ru mtkyay qu kayal nya, qutux qutux kawas ka tntnaq na pinbcywan kayal ga 30°C ki 28°C, qutux qutux kawas ka tntnaq byaqan qwalax ga ini tehuk sa 400 hawmi. taqu bsilung na 紅 sigluw squ kintan ga cingay qu bnaqiy nya, zyuwaw nqu 3 byacing tehuk sa 10 byacing kayal nqu qlyan ga tehuk squ babaw 40°C. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Asmara. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 24 na tay ymagal byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Isaias Afwerki, aring ryax 24 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 1993 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部
S.PHON: eritrea ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ taj ** ** n, ** ** e na xweʦ~ʨo s~ɕjuw. kwaraʔ kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nijaʔ ***,*** s~ɕq km (makiʔ taj ***ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨiʔ) (kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ nijaʔ ɣa ***,*** s~ɕq km, kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa **,*** s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa *,***,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħaʔ s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ rħzjal ħjaʔ ij pqmaħun ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%, lħlaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%, s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħjaʔ ɣa *.**%. zjuwaw na s~ɕraral ** zik nqu ziraj kinlħaŋan kokka nqu eritrea ɣa s~ɕaziŋ qu qins~ɕuɣan naħa, ɣmluw s~ɕqu rħjal na βs~ɕliluŋ (ʦ~ʨiŋaj qu s~ɕquli *** njux maki s~ɕqani) mʔβuŋ nqu kokka **** na rħjal **, qalaŋ ʦ~ʨjux kja s~ɕka waɣiq na rħzjal βalaj ħɣa kinβalaj nqu **** ɣwaɣiq na kiʔan s~ɕs~ɕquliq, maki s~ɕqu **** kawas~ɕ kwara ka rħjal naħa ɣa njux qolan na ***, nanu s~ɕiɣlɣij mlaħaŋ nqu *** ru rħjal naħa lɣa klħaŋan nqu *** la, βaβaw nqu mins~ɕaziŋ pintriqan naħa s~ɕa ʦ~ʨinβwanan lɣa maki qu s~ɕinwalan s~ɕinqunan na kokka ɣa, ms~ɕqun ki **** ps~ɕʔrux s~ɕqu s~ɕinqunan *********. maki s~ɕqu **** kawas~ɕ **** qani ɣa njux nja ps~ɕqunun, ru maki s~ɕqu kokka naħa qani ɣa te mopuw pajat qu rħjal naħa *. taqu ɣinβaħan nqu **** pins~ɕrxan s~ɕqu **** kawas~ɕ, s~ɕkaħul naħa s~ɕqu βniŋan naħa qeqaja mus~ɕa mqħzjuwaw maɣan s~ɕqu **** ms~ɕħriq s~ɕa ****. s~ɕquliq nqu **** ɣinβaħan maki s~ɕa linħujan **** kawas~ɕ s~ɕa ɣinleŋan na ********** kaħun s~ɕqu **** s~ɕnka ħintɣan na ɣinβaħan maki s~ɕqu pintriqan, nɣijut juɣun kaħul s~ɕqu s~ɕuruw mwaħa mʔzik na rħjal nqu s~ɕpjaŋ s~ɕmjuk na linħujan ħitaj ****. kinlħaŋan na ******** maki s~ɕqu **** kawas~ɕ βaβaw nqu wajan naħ pkuxun, maki s~ɕqu ******* ɣiqas~ɕ na s~ɕinnwalan s~ɕexu maki s~ɕa **** ptuqiq s~ɕqu ms~ɕpkwara mu s~ɕnpuŋ βiru, mos~ɕa s~ɕkaħun s~ɕinwalan mwaħa ms~ɕħriq rħjal nqu ****. maki s~ɕqu **** kawas~ɕ* βjaʦ~ʨiŋ wajal βalaj kaħun s~ɕqu mmrħuw na linħujan s~ɕinqunan kokka ki zik na kinlħaŋ mita mtzjwaw s~ɕqu ms~ɕpkwara mu s~ɕnpuŋ βiru, s~ɕunqani mita s~ɕkaħun s~ɕqu **.*% ɣa wajal s~ɕmwan maħa ps~ɕħriq s~ɕami s~ɕqu **** la, nanu jas~ɕa qu mtnaq s~ɕa kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax lɣa kmajal maħa pβuʦ~ʨis~ɕami nanak la. **** kawas~ɕ, s~ɕquliq **** ka ɣinuβaħ maki s~ɕqu linħujan wajal juɣun linħujan maħa s~ɕquliq minruk ki ms~ɕħju nqu linħujan . **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ, tmas~ɕuq qu zjuwaw pintriqan na **** ki ****, mrħuw nqu **** **********s~ɕiɣluw maqut **** s~ɕqu pins~ɕwalan pins~ɕqunan naħa inluŋan miru s~ɕqu βinkɣan. s~ɕaziŋ qu mrħuw na kokka,s~ɕpjaŋ mrħuw qu njux kmajal maħa triŋaw ta lozi qu s~ɕms~ɕun zjuwaw ɣwaħan tβziran,s~ɕms~ɕun ppila,ɣwaħan ɣlɣan ki zjuwaw na pins~ɕrŋjan, teħok s~ɕqu **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ linħujan nqu ħitaj na **** ɣa ini s~ɕħriq s~ɕqu **** min ħtɣan zjuwaw na pintriqan maki te mkura tltu ****. rrħjal ** maki s~ɕqu ħtʔɣan waɣi na * ki te mkura tltu nqu ħkuwi**, mkura kilux te βs~ɕiluŋ na **. βiħ nqu mkura kilux ****, mks~ɕoβiħ tekjopan waɣi na **, ħtʔɣan waɣi mkura kilux ki ʔmuβuj s~ɕqu rħjal na **, ħtʔɣan waɣi mkura tltu qwajan βs~ɕiluŋ na **ki** ru mkkita s~ɕqu kintan βs~ɕiluŋ na ******. (kinkwara nqu ʦ~ʨjux kkiʔan **** ru *** nqu qalaŋ rħjal) kinqrujaux nja ɣa wajal s~ɕa **** kuŋ ri. s~ɕpjaŋ waɣiq maki te kʔs~ɕka rħjal nqu kokka naħa ɣa wajal s~ɕqu ****, kinwaɣiq nja ɣa **** teħuk s~ɕqu **** mi; kilrruq nqu rħjal mkura tltu, rħjal ka ħtʔɣan waɣi s~ɕiɣluw s~ɕqu βeʔnux na rħjal. maki s~ɕqu zik na rħjal qani ɣa s~ɕpjaŋ kinwaɣiq rɣjax ɣa maki te ts~ɕka waɣiq rjax na ***-**** (amβa s~ɕoira), kinwaɣiq nja ɣa **** mi, kinrroq nja ɣa maki s~ɕqu rħjal te ħtʔɣan waɣi na *** (koβar), ħminas~ɕ s~ɕqu kinrroq na βs~ɕluŋ te ** mi, **** (s~ɕetit) s~ɕikaki s~ɕqu zik na rħjal qani qutux βlnβaβaj na lljuŋ, kinqrujux nja ɣa *** kuŋ ri, s~ɕpjaŋ kraħu nqu qins~ɕuɣan rjax lljuŋ na ****kinqrujux s~ɕunan rjax nqu qs~ɕja ɣa teħuk s~ɕqu *** kuŋ ri. kajal na maki s~ɕa waɣiq rɣjax ɣa βlaq βalajqs~ɕliq, kinħlħun nqu qutux qutux kawas~ɕ ɣa tntnaq s~ɕqu ***ʦ~ʨ, qlwaxan na qs~ɕjaħja ɣa *** ħawmi. ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ teħuk s~ɕqu * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ tntnaq na s~ɕpjaŋ rroq kinħjaqan ɣa maki s~ɕa, ***ʦ~ʨ, * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ teħuk s~ɕqu * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ kinwaɣiq nqu kajan ɣa, maki s~ɕqu ***ʦ~ʨ; * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ teħuk * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ɣa ʦ~ʨikuj qu qwalax nja, *βjaʦ~ʨiŋ teħuk s~ɕqu * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ɣa kraħu qu qwalax nja, taqu ms~ɕjaw nqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ħja lɣa mtkjaj s~ɕala. rħjal nqu ħtʔɣan waɣi ki rħjal na tekjopan waɣi ka rroq na rħjal ħja ɣa mkilux ru mtkjaj qu kajal nja, qutux qutux kawas~ɕ ka tntnaq na pinβʦ~ʨjwan kajal ɣa ***ʦ~ʨ ki ***ʦ~ʨ, qutux qutux kawas~ɕ ka tntnaq βjaqan qwalax ɣa ini teħuk s~ɕa *** ħawmi. taqu βs~ɕiluŋ na * s~ɕiɣluw s~ɕqu kintan ɣa ʦ~ʨiŋaj qu βnaqij nja, zjuwaw nqu * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ teħuk s~ɕa ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ kajal nqu qljan ɣa teħuk s~ɕqu βaβaw ***ʦ~ʨ. s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ s~ɕpzjaŋ naħaʔ kraħuʔ qalaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa as~ɕmara. s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa ** na taj jmaɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na qutux kawas~ɕ. mrħuw kokkaʔ mrħuw kokkaʔ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa is~ɕaias~ɕ a*werki, ariŋ rjax ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨia ***
